# Movies Database

> Search and explore movies, TV shows and episodes. Browse ratings, cast, plot details and more. Built with Next.js 16, React 19 and Shadcn UI.

## Links

- [Live demo](https://movies-homework.vercel.app): Browse the app
- [Source code](https://github.com/dongron/movies-homework): GitHub repository
- [Sitemap](https://movies-homework.vercel.app/sitemap.xml): Site map
